# beget_mysql_access (Resource)

MySQL database access within a managed MySQL service. Manages host-based access with password.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_mysql_configurations" "config_list" {
  version = "8.0.22"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_mysql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "MySQL Terraform"
  description      = "MySQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_mysql_configurations.config_list.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_mysql_db" "app" {
  service_id = beget_mysql_service.main.id
  db_name    = "myapp_db"
}

resource "beget_mysql_access" "app_local" {
  service_id = beget_mysql_service.main.id
  db_name    = beget_mysql_db.app.db_name
  host       = "localhost"
  password   = "Secure_Password_123!"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `db_name` (String) Database name. Changing this recreates the resource.
- `host` (String) Host or mask for which access is granted (IP, domain, %, or localhost). Must be lowercase.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for this access.
- `service_id` (String) MySQL service ID (from beget_mysql_service). Changing this recreates the resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (service_id/db_name/host).
